dedup_decision.horizon_boundary: Horizon remains a later 5.S2 Topic Radar / Content Intake strengthening candidate, not a peer 5.8 runtime.

local_contract_evidence.cli_build_command: python -m heitang_kb_forge.cli build-business-scenario-template-library --output artifacts/audits/section_5/ai_money_maker_handbook_business_scenario_library/business_scenario_library --library-name "HeiTang Business Scenario Template Library"

why_real_integration: A local original Business Scenario Template Library is implemented and validated.
The run produced non-empty scenario cards, workflow templates, an index, a report, and a validation report.
The capability adds product value to Template Library and Skill Factory template selection without copying or executing the external project.
boundaries: real_integration means limited local original business scenario template library only.
No ai-money-maker-handbook runtime, code, prompt files, SKILL.md files, scripts, or repository contents are bundled.
No trading, payment processing, ad spend, crawler, account operation, financial advice, money automation, or revenue guarantee is implemented.
UI may show Business Template Library status and Skill Factory template picker preview only; full UI workflow remains a later campaign.
remaining_gap: Section 5 items 5.9 through 5.14, strengthening items 5.S1-5.S3, Campaign 3 final consistency gate, external Skill learning E2E, owned Skill generation, multi-agent workflow, full UI workflow, Core Bridge, configuration, Full Gate, EXE, and release remain incomplete.
